description: Shared coaching observation vocabulary used by Coach Calibration Workbench profiles. These entries define coach-facing concepts only; engineering metric comparisons are handled downstream in calibration analysis.

shoulder_turn.label: Shoulder Turn
shoulder_turn.description: Assess whether the player has rotated the shoulders appropriately for the selected phase.

hip_rotation.label: Hip Rotation
hip_rotation.description: Assess whether the hips rotate appropriately into and through the selected phase.

shoulder_hip_separation.label: Shoulder / Hip Separation
shoulder_hip_separation.description: Assess whether the relationship between shoulder rotation and hip rotation looks appropriate for the selected phase.

hitting_arm_extension.label: Hitting Arm Extension
hitting_arm_extension.description: Assess the extension and reach of the hitting arm for the selected phase.

non_hitting_arm_extension.label: Non-hitting Arm Extension
non_hitting_arm_extension.description: Assess whether the non-hitting arm is extended or positioned appropriately for the selected phase.

hitting_arm_structure.label: Hitting Arm Structure
hitting_arm_structure.description: Assess whether the hitting arm shape is appropriate for the selected phase, including whether it looks compact, controlled and well organised.

non_hitting_arm_support.label: Non-hitting Arm Support
non_hitting_arm_support.description: Assess whether the non-hitting arm supports the stroke effectively through positioning, balance or preparation.

elbow_position.label: Elbow Position
elbow_position.description: Assess whether the elbow position is appropriate for the selected phase, including whether it appears too tucked, too extended, too high or too far from the body.

knee_bend.label: Knee Bend
knee_bend.description: Assess whether the player has an appropriate athletic base and knee flexion for the selected phase.

racket_side_preparation.label: Arm / Racket-Side Preparation
racket_side_preparation.description: Assess whether the hitting side is prepared appropriately for the selected phase. This is judged from visible arm and body positioning rather than racket-face detail.

contact_height.label: Contact Height
contact_height.description: Assess whether the apparent contact height is appropriate relative to the player's body position.

contact_distance.label: Contact Distance from Body
contact_distance.description: Assess whether the apparent contact point is appropriately spaced from the body.

body_balance.label: Body Balance
body_balance.description: Assess whether the player looks balanced, stable and in control during the selected phase.

shoulder_vertical_alignment.label: Shoulder Vertical Alignment
shoulder_vertical_alignment.description: Assess whether the shoulders appear vertically organised and controlled, rather than excessively tilted or collapsed, during the selected phase.

stance_width.label: Stance Width
stance_width.description: Assess whether the player's stance width is appropriate for the selected phase.

weight_transfer.label: Weight Transfer / Forward Commitment
weight_transfer.description: Assess whether the player transfers weight or commits forward appropriately through the selected phase.

follow_through_shape.label: Follow-through Shape
follow_through_shape.description: Assess whether the follow-through shape looks compact, controlled and appropriate for the shot.
